name: alcove
description: MCP server that gives AI coding agents on-demand access to private project docs without context bloat. Hybrid BM25+vector search lets agents pull only what they need, tree-sitter code indexing maps modules, functions, and types across 12 languages so agents understand code structure, policy.toml enforces doc standards across teams, and lint catches broken links, orphans, and stale markers automatically. Private docs stay on your machine — never in public repos.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first MCP doc server — hybrid BM25+vector search, tree-sitter code indexing, policy enforcement, and lint for project knowledge.
